chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: Now, next we are going to talk about our grid template. Grid template is used to define the lines and track sizing of my grid container. That is, how many grid lines should be on the grid container and what should be the size of the track. That is, how many lines should be there and how much distance should be there between the lines.

chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: That is, how many lines should be there and how much distance should be there between the lines. To define all those things, we use our grid template property. To define our rows, we write grid template rows and after that we write all the tracks size. Let's suppose we have to design a layout like this in which we have 3 rows.

chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: Let's suppose we have to design a layout like this in which we have 3 rows. That is, this is my line number 1, this is going to be L1, this is going to be L2, this is going to be L3, this is going to be L4. Number of rows is 3, this is my first row, this is my second row, this is my third row. So, how many tracks we have?

chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: So, how many tracks we have? This is my track 1, this is my track 2, this is my track 3. So, what we will do is, we will write the individual length of these 3 tracks in the value of this property. If I want this track to be of 100 pixels, this track should be of 100 pixels, this track should be of 100 pixels.

chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: If I want this track to be of 100 pixels, this track should be of 100 pixels, this track should be of 100 pixels. What are the 100 pixels? We are calling this distance as 100 pixels, we are calling this distance as 100 pixels and this distance as 100 pixels. We have 4 lines, 4 tracks means we have 5 lines.

chunks.title: 11_Grid Template
chunks.text: We have 4 lines, 4 tracks means we have 5 lines. So, the number of lines is always plus 1 because the track is of 2 lines. So, if we want 3 rows in grid template rows, then we can write the width of the 3 tracks which is going to be 100 pixels, 100 pixels and 100 pixels. So, by writing the value of this type, we can create only 3 rows, so we will go into the container which we have given the display grid.
